question: State of the patient-derived-organoid drug-screening literature
provenance: ALL 12 records are ILLUSTRATIVE synthetic records (doi prefix 10.9999/*, marked illustrative:true) that demonstrate the evidence-scan detectors on realistic organoid drug-screening themes. None is a real publication; Keystone badges every one as illustrative and never presents it as a real DOI. The frontier scorecard rates a described study's rigor, not these DOIs.
